description_long: This hotel is a modern, rectangular building with a flat roof and a symmetrical facade. The structure is surrounded by a large paved parking area with multiple cars and a single palm tree accenting the front. On one side of the property, there is a green lawn area with a rectangular swimming pool and a row of poolside lounge chairs. The building features numerous evenly spaced windows and a main entrance that is centrally located. The exterior is finished in light gray and white tones, giving it a clean, contemporary appearance. The property is bordered by low walls, and there are two small outbuildings or utility structures at the rear corners.
description: A modern, rectangular hotel with a flat roof, large parking lot, swimming pool, and symmetrical window layout. The exterior is light gray and white, with landscaped and paved areas.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the hotel from above and at an angle, highlighting the parking lot, palm tree, and the pool area with lounge chairs on the right.
description_view_1: View 1 presents a direct front view, emphasizing the main entrance, symmetrical facade, and the full width of the parking lot.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the rear and side, focusing on the pool, green lawn, and the two small outbuildings at the back.
description_view_3: View 3 shows the hotel from the opposite side of view 1, with the parking lot and palm tree in the foreground and the building's full length visible.
